DP.333.0000:
Rowan: Ah, [0103,0000]!\f
You’ve come to show me the progress
you’ve made on your Pokédex?
DP.333.0001:
Hmm...\f
You’ve spotted [0134,0000] Pokémon in
Sinnoh...\f
DP.333.0002:
What’s wrong?\f
You’re not suggesting you’ve seen so
few that you’re afraid to show me?
DP.333.0003:
Rowan: You’re working hard on your
National Pokédex I see.\f
I expect big things from you!
DP.333.0004:
I see!\f
You’ve met all the Pokémon there
are in Sinnoh!\f
[0103,0000], I need to see you
at my lab. I’ll be waiting!
DP.333.0005:
I see!\f
You’ve met all the Pokémon there
are in Sinnoh!
DP.333.0006:
Look harder for wild Pokémon.\f
Don’t be afraid of going into tall
grass.
DP.333.0007:
Your pace is picking up.
Things can only get better!
DP.333.0008:
Be persistent when you’re searching
for Pokémon that appear only in\r
certain places.
DP.333.0009:
Pokémon aren’t hiding only in
tall grass.\f
You can find many others in caves
and seas.
DP.333.0010:
Your Pokédex is looking more and more
respectable!
DP.333.0011:
Are you fishing with rods?\f
Pokémon that live underwater need
to be caught by fishing.
DP.333.0012:
The Trainers that challenge you to
battle have Pokémon, obviously.\f
They may have rare ones with them,
and that can add to your Pokédex.
DP.333.0013:
Your Pokédex is well on the way to
being filled up.\f
This Pokédex can be considered
a journal of your adventure.
DP.333.0014:
You’re not far from seeing every
Pokémon there is to see in Sinnoh!
DP.333.0015:
Oak: Ah, [0103,0000]!\f
You’ve come to show me how
your Pokédex is coming along?
DP.333.0016:
Oak: Ah, [0103,0000]!\f
You’ve come to show me how
your Pokédex is coming along?
DP.333.0018:
I see...\f
Come see me if you’d like me to have
a look at your Pokédex.
DP.333.0019:
They say there are at least 400
species of Pokémon nationwide.\f
If you’re planning to catch them all,
you’d better be a committed Trainer.
DP.333.0020:
Hm! Little by little, you’re filling
the Pokédex with complete\r
data on Pokémon you’ve gotten.\f
Keep up the good work!
DP.333.0021:
Here’s a tip on catching Pokémon
in the wild.\f
Minimize their HP before you throw
out your Poké Ball to catch ’em.
DP.333.0022:
Remember: If you can’t catch them,
you can always trade for them.\f
As soon as you trade, the Pokémon’s
data is added to the Pokédex.\f
That’s why you should seek out
as many trades as possible.
DP.333.0023:
Have you visited the Great Marsh?\f
Some Pokémon only appear in places
such as that.
DP.333.0024:
As you know, there are Pokémon
that eventually evolve.\f
That’s an important thing to consider
when you’re filling your Pokédex.
DP.333.0025:
You’ve proven yourself capable.
There’s nothing to worry about.\f
Keep catching Pokémon the way you’ve
been doing so far.
DP.333.0026:
Are you aware that there is more
than one style of evolution?\f
There are some Pokémon that evolve
by becoming friends with the Trainer.
DP.333.0027:
Apparently, there are some Pokémon
that appear in swarms on occasion.\f
Don’t miss out on these massive
outbreaks of Pokémon!
DP.333.0028:
Amazing! You’ve already gotten over
300 Pokémon!\f
That’s already a major achievement,
but I know you’re capable of more!
DP.333.0029:
Some wild Pokémon only appear during
certain times of the day.\f
You’ll need to look for Pokémon
around the clock.
DP.333.0030:
I’ve been getting reports of
different Pokémon sightings.\f
By different, I mean Pokémon that
aren’t native to the Sinnoh region.\f
You should perhaps go back to
areas you’ve already scoured.\f
You may end up seeing Pokémon
that weren’t there before.
DP.333.0031:
[0103,0000], have you visited
the Pal Park recently?\f
There still may be Pokémon that are
rarely seen in Sinnoh.
DP.333.0032:
[0103,0000], have you visited
the Pal Park recently?\f
There still may be Pokémon that are
rarely seen in Sinnoh.
DP.333.0033:
Hm! Your Pokédex is getting closer
to completion.\f
Have you ever considered a career
as a Pokémon professor?
DP.333.0034:
Hmm... You’ve caught quite the
impressive collection of Pokémon.\f
You’ve obviously had to employ many
means to seek them all out.\f
Keep an eye out for rustling tall
grass and search it thoroughly.
DP.333.0035:
I can only marvel at the diversity
of Pokémon.\f
I’m still very much in awe of
them.
DP.333.0036:
Good, good, you’re getting close to
completing the Pokédex.\f
I’m looking forward to seeing its
completion.\f
When that happens, your views about
Pokémon will likely have changed!
DP.333.0037:
Hmm... You are so very close to
completing your Pokédex.\f
Think about what’s missing.
Recall what you’ve overlooked.\f
You’re so close--please finish
the Pokédex!
DP.333.0038:
[0103,0000]!
You’ve finally done it!\f
You’ve finally completed
the National Pokédex!\f
This is better than meeting any
exotic Pokémon for the first time!\f
I feel blessed to have become friends
with a Trainer like you!\f
Sincerely, I thank you from the
bottom of my heart!
DP.333.0039:
[0103,0000]!
You’ve finally done it!\f
You’ve finally completed
the National Pokédex!\f
This is better than meeting any
exotic Pokémon for the first time!\f
I feel blessed to have become friends
with a Trainer like you!\f
Sincerely, I thank you from the
bottom of my heart!
